AdvancedLogisticsDeviceBlock.DescriptionInserter:
On an electric pulse, pulls items from the rear container into the front one.
Place samples in filter slots and use allow-list or deny-list; an empty list filters nothing.
With no front container, items are ejected.
AdvancedLogisticsDeviceBlock.DescriptionFluidInserter:
On an electric pulse, moves roughly one bucket of fluid from the rear tank to the front tank.
Place sample fluids and use allow-list or deny-list; an empty list filters nothing.
AdvancedLogisticsDeviceBlock.DescriptionSorter: When items hit this sorter, they are ejected by the red, yellow, green, or blue side filters and never enter the machine. Each side has an allow-list or deny-list with sample slots: an empty allow-list rejects on that side; an empty deny-list takes the rest. Unmatched items bounce back. Sides are checked red → yellow → green → blue.

LogisticsStorageUnitBlock.Description: Expandable storage. Adjacent units share one vault whose capacity grows with the cluster; right-click to open, and page when it fills up. Inserters can pull from and push into the sides. Craft from a iron chest with zinc plates, or a steel chest with fewer zinc plates.

Descriptions.AdvancedInserter: Upgrade an inserter with a circuit, logic gates, and zinc-sheet cladding
Descriptions.AdvancedFluidInserter: Upgrade a fluid inserter with a circuit, logic gates, and zinc-sheet cladding
Descriptions.AdvancedSorter: Upgrade a sorter with a circuit, logic gates, and zinc-sheet cladding
Descriptions.LogisticsStorageUnitChest: Assemble a logistics storage unit from a iron chest and zinc plates
Descriptions.LogisticsStorageUnitSteelChest: Assemble a logistics storage unit from a steel chest and fewer zinc plates
